home.sectionActionsSubtitle: Sign petitions or join collective legal actions

actions.heroSubtitle: Join the actions that matter to you. Every signature counts.
actions.goFurtherSubtitle: Become a stakeholder in legal actions by choosing your plan.

tarifs.heroText: Wejustice receives no subsidies, no public funding, no private support. Our total independence is the price of our freedom to act. We rely solely on the support of our members. It is the only way for the 5<sup>th</sup> power to exist and remain accessible to all.
tarifs.choosePlanSubtitle: Your subscription funds the legal proceedings, lawyers, and tools that make Justice accessible.
tarifs.reducedRateInfo: Reserved for low-income individuals (students, unemployed, low pensions) who agree to provide supporting documents upon request.
tarifs.joinFreeSubtitle: Create your free account to sign unlimited petitions.
tarifs.orgSubtitle: Unions, companies, associations and NGOs: Wejustice allows you to launch collective legal actions to defend your members and your cause.
tarifs.upTo2PersonsDesc: For me and one family member
tarifs.upTo3PersonsDesc: For me and two family members
tarifs.faq1q: What is the difference between signing and joining?
tarifs.faq1a: Signing an action is free and unlimited: it expresses your support. Joining means becoming a stakeholder in the legal action, which is governed by your plan.
tarifs.faq2q: Can I change my plan along the way?
tarifs.faq2a: Yes, you can upgrade to a higher plan at any time. The difference will be calculated pro rata based on your remaining commitment.
tarifs.faq3a: The reduced rate (-50%) is reserved for people in financial hardship (unemployed, students, low pensions). Proof may be requested.
tarifs.faq4q: How does the group plan work?
tarifs.faq4a: With the Maxi (2 people) or Aura (3 people) plans, you fund the subscription for your loved ones. Each person has their own account and their own actions.
tarifs.faq5a: Wejustice is in the process of obtaining public interest status. We will inform you as soon as the tax deductibility is active.
tarifs.faq6q: What happens if I don't renew?
tarifs.faq6a: Your signatures remain active. You simply won't be able to join new actions until you reactivate a plan.

signature.dataProtectedTip: Your information is encrypted and never shared with third parties.
